F_real_eigenvector_case.note: T-symmetric: F = 0 (real eigenvectors have no Berry phase)

chirality_flux_conversion.derivation: theta_k = pi / k from chiral half-rotation per k-fold-axis loop; flux_quanta = theta_k / (2 pi) = 1/(2k). The 5-fold axis is the principal AKN-defining rotation; k=5 gives flux_quanta = 0.10.
chirality_flux_conversion.tier: Tier 3 (geometric heuristic; full derivation requires the explicit chirality -> Peierls phase map on RT plaquettes from the GCT action App M Sec M.5).

alpha_residual_estimate_at_principal_5fo.tier: Tier 3 (order-of-magnitude estimate; full bubble integration with explicit gauge-coupling normalisation is the remaining O.19 magnitude work).

status: Berry curvature NON-ZERO at I_h-symmetric reference under TRB element. Chirality-induced |F|^2 at the principal 5-fold flux setting yields a delta(alpha^-1) estimate ~ 0.01 ppm at the 12-site toy level, 2-3 decades below the 41.6 ppm O.19 residual target. The gap admits three possible readings (12-site->N=144 scaling, App M Sec M.3.1 shape-factor decomposition of the 41.6 ppm, gauge-coupling normalisation); sign and structural class are confirmed; full magnitude closure remains O.19 open.
